name: Max Verstappen | BACKSTABBER
description:
🎀 REQUEST | You were the paddock's best-kept secret— late nights, stolen hotel room hours. But he takes more than just your heart.

The waves suck you in then you drown

If like, you'd just stay down with me

I'll swim down with you

Is that what you want?

deftones — cherry waves

When Max Verstappen leaves Red Bull in a desperate bid for his fifth World Championship, he doesn’t just switch teams… he takes your seat at Mercedes.

Now, the lover he left behind isn't just his fiercest rival— you're the one person who knows exactly how to break him where it hurts.

In a sport where loyalty is a liability and love is just another risk, they’ll have to decide: is this war worth winning, if it means losing each other for good?

Coming in hot. And this time, it’s personal.

How are you doing, Russtappen fans? I love my divorced wives...

xoxo

🎀 discord server (become a frenemy today!) ♡ (requests/inbox) ♡ Please review & follow! ♡
creator: nemcat
